Container.Name: MCPGateway
Container.Description: Docker MCP Gateway for Unraid. A unified API gateway that runs MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers as Docker containers and exposes them to AI clients on your LAN.
Container.Overview:
The MCP Gateway allows AI agents (Claude Desktop, VS Code, Cursor, etc.) to access MCP tools running in Docker containers. All communication stays within your local network — no data leaves your LAN.
Features: • Run MCP servers as isolated Docker containers • Single endpoint for multiple MCP tools • Secrets management via .env files • No internet required once configured • Works with Claude Desktop, VS Code, Cursor, and any MCP client

Config.Name: App Port
Config.Description: Port the gateway listens on for MCP connections

Config.Name: Transport
Config.Description: Transport protocol: stdio, sse, or streaming (streaming recommended for LAN use)

Config.Name: MCP Servers
Config.Description: Comma-separated list of MCP servers to enable. Options: fetch, duckduckgo, filesystem, github-official, postgres, slack, etc.

Config.Name: Memory Limit
Config.Description: Memory limit per MCP server container (e.g. 512Mb, 1Gb, 2Gb)

Config.Name: CPU Limit
Config.Description: CPU cores per MCP server container

Config.Name: Log Calls
Config.Description: Enable logging of MCP tool calls

Config.Name: Verify Signatures
Config.Description: Verify Docker MCP image signatures. Disable for local/private servers.

Config.Name: Docker Socket
Config.Description: Docker socket - required for gateway to launch MCP server containers

Config.Name: Config Directory
Config.Description: Mount a local MCP catalog config (optional)

Config.Name: Secrets Directory
Config.Description: Directory containing .env file with API keys/tokens (optional)

Config.Name: DOCKER_MCP_IN_CONTAINER
Config.Description: Must be set to 1 to run outside Docker Desktop
